goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 11:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'la mimosa'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '15:15' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 11:00 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from london kings cross and should leave on monday
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called la mimosa
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 15:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
